papers.title_en: Quantifying Cross-Query Contradictions in Multi-Query LLM Reasoning
papers.authors: Rohit Kumar Salla, Ramya Manasa Amancherla, Manoj Saravanan
papers.evidence: 逻辑一致性和信念状态可靠性的定量指标
papers.tldr: 针对大语言模型在处理多个相关查询时常出现逻辑矛盾的问题，本研究提出了“案卷逻辑一致性”概念，旨在保持全局可满足的信念状态。研究引入了包含390个推理实例的新基准和评估指标，并开发了一种结合求解器的增强方法，通过提取承诺、验证一致性及反例引导修复，在保持单查询准确性的同时显著减少了跨查询矛盾。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models frequently produce mutually inconsistent answers when reasoning over multiple related queries. We study case-file logical consistency: maintaining a globally satisfiable belief state across interdependent queries. We introduce a benchmark of 390 multi-query reasoning instances with entailment/contradiction/unknown labels and propose set-level metrics including Case Satisfiability Rate, Contradiction Density and Revision Cost. Our solver-augmented approach extracts commitments, verifies global satisfiability and performs counterexample-guided repair. Across four reasoning domains, our method substantially reduces cross-query contradictions (SetCons: 0.56 to 0.94) while preserving per-query accuracy, demonstrating that global coherence is critical for robust multi-query reasoning.
